title: Discord Invite
description: Simple minecraft plugin that allows server owners to provide access to their discord server in a controlled manner.
body:
This plugin provides server owners with a simple method of linking their users to their discord server.

The plugin provides two commands.

/setdiscord <link>

/discord

**setdiscord** is given to OP by default, its associated permission node is **discordinvite.admin**

**discord** is given to everyone by default, its associated permission node is **discordinvite.invite**

Changes made to the link are logged in the history.txt file, in the plugin folder.
